title: Update Reject Recommendation
content:
# Update Reject Recommendation

Update a Recommendation `state` to `rejected`. All `actions` will only be archived and not implemented.

## Endpoint

`POST /recommendations/{recommendation_id}/reject/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.recommendation.updateRecommendationReject()
print(response)

parameters.name: recommendation_id
parameters.description: Recommendation key `id` to reject. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the decision to reject the Recommendation. This is usually, but not mandatory, related to any machine learning model confidence results.

message.example: Recommendation is not accurate based on the current performance.
message.description: Contains a message with any descriptions useful to be associated with the `reject` state.
